emails.subject: Re: 4/28 Checkout
emails.body: Re: 4/28 Checkout BLOOMBERG 585337 changed to APS I can't remember did we decide to use APS as CTPY name with Bloomberg only until they change it to Pinnacle in their system? This won't mess up confirms later? AMEREX 585230 del. point is palo, says Driscoll he's calling his broker to clear this up Thanks, Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 04/18/2001 02:35 PM

emails.subject: 4/28 Checkout
emails.body: 4/28 Checkout PREBON WEST All o.k. BLOOMBERG Mike Swerzbin deal 585337 Bloomberg shows cp as Arizona Public AMEREX Mike Driscoll deal 585230 I confirmed Palo Verde as the del. point and Amerex Webcheckout has SP-15... Can you double check location with MIke on this deal.
